meta.title: roami — In a new city, find your people on the map
meta.description: Find people for food, coffee, drinks, and activities nearby while you travel. A Korean-friendly meetup app that supports Korean and English.

problem.label: Problem
problem.title: Still meeting people the hard way in a new city?
problem.card1Desc: There are lots of messages, but it is hard to tell who is free, where to meet, and when.
problem.card2Desc: You can post and wait, but replies are slow and plans often do not line up.
problem.card3Desc: Even if you meet someone nearby, it is hard to know if your timing or vibe will match.
problem.highlight: roami lets you find and connect with people nearby right on the map.

solution.label: Solution
solution.title: roami makes travel meetups easier and more immediate.
solution.point1: Browse meetups nearby on a map
solution.point2: See what is happening now, today, or tomorrow
solution.point3: Join casual meetups for coffee, food, drinks, and activities
solution.point4: Keep it light with small groups

features.label: Features
features.title: Five types of meetups on the map
features.subtitle: Eat, drink, explore. Find people for whatever you want to do.
features.eatDesc: Find someone to share a meal at a local restaurant. Better than eating alone.
features.cafeDesc: Meet someone at a cozy cafe to chat or work together.
features.drinksDesc: Enjoy the night with company. Share travel stories over a casual drink.
features.activityDesc: Tours, hiking, diving and more. Find people for fun activities.
features.sightseeingDesc: Explore landmarks, take photos, and discover the city with fellow travelers.
features.mapFirstDesc: Instead of scrolling through lists, see meetups around you right on the map. See where, when, and what kind of meetups are happening at a glance.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Finding meetups is this easy
howItWorks.step1Desc: Open the map of the city you are traveling in.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See what meetups are happening nearby.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Request to join a meetup that fits you.

whyRoami.label: Why roami
whyRoami.title: Why it feels easier
whyRoami.point1: See where meetups are happening at a glance
whyRoami.point2: Focus on what is actually happening soon
whyRoami.point3: Smaller groups feel lighter and less awkward
whyRoami.point4: Easy to start in Korean or English

useCases.case3: Find a casual drink meetup tonight
useCases.case4: Join a photo walk or local activity

trust.label: Trust
trust.title: Designed to feel lighter and safer
trust.point1Desc: Verify your identity to build trust.
trust.point2Desc: Trust signals from meetup history help you decide.
trust.point3Desc: Keep it casual with small group sizes.
trust.point4Desc: Exact location is shared only after approval.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have questions about roami?
faq.a1: For travelers who want to meet nearby people for casual plans.
faq.a2: No. It is built for light travel meetups like food, coffee, drinks, and activities.
faq.a3: No. It is open to everyone, with support for Korean and English.
faq.q4: Is the exact location always shown?
faq.a4: Not always. Depending on the meetup type, exact location may be shared after approval.

faqPage.a1: roami is a map-based meetup app for meeting people while you travel. Find people for food, coffee, drinks, and activities right on the map. Instead of relying on group chats or community posts, find people nearby in real time.
faqPage.q2: What kinds of meetups can I find?
faqPage.a2:
roami offers five categories of meetups:

• Food — Find someone to share a meal at a local restaurant
• Cafe — Meet at a cozy cafe for conversation or coworking
• Drinks — Grab a casual drink at a bar or pub
• Sightseeing — Explore landmarks, take photos, and discover the city
• Activity — Join tours, hikes, diving, and more

Each category is shown on the map so you can quickly find and join meetups.
faqPage.a3:
It's very simple:

1. Open the map — See the map of the city you're traveling in.
2. Find meetups — Check what's happening nearby.
3. Request to join — Send a join request to a meetup you like.
4. Meet up — Once the host approves, meet at the location!

You can also create your own meetup and be the host.
faqPage.a4: Yes, roami's core features are free. Finding meetups, creating meetups, and joining are all free. Premium features may be added in the future, but the basic service will always be free.
faqPage.a5:
User safety is our top priority.

• Host approval — Not just anyone can join. The host reviews and approves join requests.
• Required profiles — All users must set up a profile to use the service.
• Public places recommended — We encourage meeting in public places like cafes and restaurants.
• Report & block — You can report or block users for inappropriate behavior.

We're building a safe meetup culture together.
faqPage.a6: roami is launching soon, starting with popular travel destinations. Let us know your city of interest when you sign up, and we'll factor it into our rollout plans.
faqPage.a7: We're working hard on development and launching soon. When the date is set, waitlist members will be the first to know.
